author: Lisa Levin
headline: Fear & Greed Index Moves To 'Neutral' Zone As Markets Digest Powell's Speech
summary:
The CNN Money Fear and Greed index moved back to the "neutral" zone despite a decline in the US stocks on Monday.

Energy stocks gained around 1.5% on Monday as crude oil prices surged about 4% on prospects of output cuts by the OPEC+.

headline: Fear & Greed Index Drops But Remains In 'Neutral' Zone
summary:
The CNN Money Fear and Greed index remained in the "neutral" zone, but moved lower following another drop in the US stocks on Tuesday.

Each of the 11 S&P 500 sectors closed in negative zone, with the energy sector dropping around 3.4%, as crude oil prices dipped more than 5% on Tuesday.
